name: ST·OUT
description: Stereo modular-to-line output interface. Fader, tilt EQ, soft/hard drive switch, and peak meter feed a balanced stereo TRS pair plus a dedicated headphone output.

controls.name: Volume
controls.description: Fader sets level sent to both balanced line outputs and the headphone path.

controls.name: Tilt EQ
controls.description: Single-knob tonal balance. Rotates a tilt filter around a centre frequency — one end lifts highs and cuts lows, the other reverses.
controls.detail: CCW: darker (bass up, treble down) · noon: flat · CW: brighter

controls.name: Drive
controls.description: Toggle inserts an analog saturation stage before the output buffer.

controls.name: Headphones
controls.description: Independent level for the front-panel headphone jack. Does not affect line outputs.

outputs.name: L Out (balanced TRS)
outputs.description: Left balanced line-level output on 6.3mm TRS jack. Feeds mixer / interface / amp.

outputs.name: R Out (balanced TRS)
outputs.description: Right balanced line-level output on 6.3mm TRS jack.

outputs.name: Headphones
outputs.description: Stereo 6.3mm TRS headphone output. Level set by Headphones knob independent of fader.

behaviors.name: Balanced stereo conversion
behaviors.trigger: L/R patched, cables plugged into rear balanced outs
behaviors.description: Converts hot modular ±5V swings down to a balanced line level suitable for studio monitors or interfaces. Balanced sends reject long-cable hum when the receiving gear is also balanced.

behaviors.name: Peak metering
behaviors.trigger: Signal present on L or R
behaviors.description: Dual-channel LED meter reacts to post-drive signal. Clip LED flags when the drive stage or output buffer is being pushed into limiting — use it to set fader pre-saturation.

behaviors.name: Soft vs hard drive
behaviors.description: Soft adds gentle even-order warmth and compresses peaks. Hard folds the top of the waveform harder for audible grit and buzz. Both stages run pre-fader, so Volume tames the distorted signal at the output.

behaviors.name: Tilt EQ as final polish
behaviors.description: Single-knob mastering tilt: one direction brightens while simultaneously cutting bass, the opposite direction darkens. Useful to compensate for monitoring room or to counter the high-frequency grit introduced by hard drive.

patchIdeas.name: Studio monitor hand-off
patchIdeas.patch: Stereo mixer → L/R In · Drive off · Tilt at noon · balanced TRS out to monitor interface · fader controls master listening level.
patchIdeas.diagram:
ST·OUT:
* Drive: Off
* Tilt: noon
* Volume: ~3 o'clock

Mixer:

- Mixer (L) -> ST·OUT (L In)
- Mixer (R) -> ST·OUT (R In)
- ST·OUT (L Out) -> Output (L)
- ST·OUT (R Out) -> Output (R)

patchIdeas.name: Bus-grit on the master
patchIdeas.patch: Full mix into L/R · Drive set to Hard · Tilt slightly CCW to tame top grit · peak LEDs stay just below clip · recording output picks up saturated bus tone.
patchIdeas.diagram:
ST·OUT:
* Drive: Hard
* Tilt: ~10 o'clock
* Volume: ~2 o'clock

Mixer:

- Mixer (L) -> ST·OUT (L In)
- Mixer (R) -> ST·OUT (R In)
- ST·OUT (L Out) -> Recorder (L)
- ST·OUT (R Out) -> Recorder (R)

patchIdeas.name: Silent-stage headphone cue
patchIdeas.patch: Modular feed going to interface through Line outs · Headphones knob set for cue level · performer monitors on-stage without affecting the FOH send.
patchIdeas.diagram:
ST·OUT:
* Drive: Soft
* Volume: unity
* Headphones: ~1 o'clock

Mixer:

- Mixer (L) -> ST·OUT (L In)
- Mixer (R) -> ST·OUT (R In)
- ST·OUT (L Out) -> FOH (L)
- ST·OUT (R Out) -> FOH (R)

patchIdeas.name: Saturated mono send to effects
patchIdeas.patch: Only L In patched · Drive Soft for warmth · Tilt CW for lift · use single L Out to feed an external pedal or desk channel — R Out and headphone remain silent.
patchIdeas.diagram:
ST·OUT:
* Drive: Soft
* Tilt: ~2 o'clock

Mono Source:

- Mono Source (Out) -> ST·OUT (L In)
- ST·OUT (L Out) -> FX Pedal (In)
